Hero.HiddenTitle: Scan or search for a product
Hero.ScanningDescription: Align the barcode within the frame.
Hero.LaunchDescription: Search first if you want. When you are ready, tap here and the camera will activate for a live barcode scan.

Status.Title: Scanner status
Status.CameraOff: Camera stays off until you tap the scan card.
Status.Active: Scanner ready. Position the barcode in the frame.

Diagnostics.Title: Camera diagnostics
Diagnostics.Description: Temporary debug output for camera selection on this device.

Tips.Title: Tips for Precision Scanning
Tips.LightingDescription: Ensure the product is in a well-lit area to help our AI identify fine print ingredients.
Tips.SteadyDescription: Hold your phone parallel to the barcode for the fastest recognition speed.
